except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return restaurants\n\n\ndef load_menus():\n    \"\"\"Load menu items from menus.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR,          menus.append(menu_item)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return menus\n\n\ndef load_cart():\n    \"\"\"Load cart items from cart.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'cart.txt')\n    cart = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return cart\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in               cart_item = {\n                    'cart_id': int(parts[0]),\n                    'item_id': int(parts[1]),\n                    'restaurant_id': int(parts[2]),\n                    'quantity': int(parts[3]),\n                    'added_date': parts[4]  # as string, date in format YYYY-MM-DD\n                }\n                cart.append(cart_item)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return cart\n\n\ndef load_orders():\n    \"\"\"Load orders from orders.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'orders.txt')\n    orders = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return orders\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n                  'total_amount': float(parts[4]),\n                    'status': parts[5],\n                    'delivery_address': parts[6],\n                    'phone_number': parts[7]\n                }\n                orders.append(order)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return orders\n\n\ndef load_order_items():\n    \"\"\"Load order items from order_items.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'order_items.txt')\n    order_items = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return order_items\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts)!=5:\n                continue\n            try:\n                order_item = {\n                    'order_item_id': int(parts[0]),\n                    'order_id': int(parts[1]),\n                    'item_id': int(parts[2]),\n                    'quantity': int(parts[3]),\n                    'price': float(parts[4])\n                }\n                order_items.append(order_item)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return order_items\n\n\ndef load_deliveries():\n    \"\"\"Load delivery info from deliveries.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'deliveries.txt')\n    deliveries = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return deliveries\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts)!=7:\n                continue\n            try:\n                delivery = {\n                    'delivery_id': int(parts[0]),\n                    'order_id': int(parts[1]),\n                    'driver_name': parts[2],\n                    'driver_phone': parts[3],\n                    'vehicle_info': parts[4],\n                    'status': parts[5],\n                    'estimated_time': parts[6]  # datetime string\n                }\n                deliveries.append(delivery)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return deliveries\n\n\ndef load_reviews():\n    \"\"\"Load reviews from reviews.txt as a list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'reviews.txt')\n    reviews = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return reviews\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts)!=6:\n                continue\n            try:\n                review = {\n                    'review_id': int(parts[0]),\n                    'restaurant_id': int(parts[1]),\n                    'customer_name': parts[2],\n                    'rating': int(parts[3]),\n                    'review_text': parts[4],\n                    'review_date': parts[5]  # string date\n                }\n                reviews.append(review)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return reviews\n\n# --- ROUTE IMPLEMENTATIONS ---\n\n# 1. `/` - redirect_to_dashboard\n@app.route('/')\ndef redirect_to_dashboard():\n    return redirect(url_for('show_dashboard'))\n\n# 2. `/dashboard` - show_dashboard\n@app.route('/dashboard')\ndef show_dashboard():\n    restaurants = load_restaurants()\n    # featured_restaurants: List[dict]\n    # Let's define featured as top 3 by rating\n    featured_restaurants = sorted(restaurants, key=lambda x: x['rating'], reverse=True)[:3]\n    popular_cuisines = sorted({r['cuisine'] for r in restaurants})\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_restaurants=featured_restaurants, popular_cuisines=popular_cuisines)\n\n# 3. `/restaurants` - list_restaurants\n@app.route('/restaurants')\ndef list_restaurants():\n    restaurants = load_restaurants()\n    search_query = request.args.get('search_query', '').strip()\n    cuisine_filter = request.args.get('cuisine_filter', '').strip()\n\n    filtered_restaurants = restaurants\n\n    if search_query:\n        filtered_restaurants = [r for r in filtered_restaurants if search_query.lower() in r['name'].lower()]\n    if cuisine_filter:\n        filtered_restaurants = [r for r in filtered_restaurants if r['cuisine'].lower() == cuisine_filter.lower()]\n\n    return render_template('restaurants.html', restaurants=filtered_restaurants, search_query=search_query, cuisine_filter=cuisine_filter)\n\n# 4. `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu` - show_menu\n@app.route('/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu')\ndef show_menu(restaurant_id):\n    restaurants = load_restaurants()\n    restaurant = next((r for r in restaurants if r['restaurant_id'] == restaurant_id), None)\n    if not restaurant:\n        abort(404)\n    menus = load_menus()\n    menu_items = [item for item in menus if item['restaurant_id'] == restaurant_id and item['availability']]\n    return render_template('menu.html', restaurant=restaurant, menu_items=menu_items)\n\n# 5. `/items/<int:item_id>` - show_item_details\n@app.route('/items/<int:item_id>')\ndef show_item_details(item_id):\n    menus = load_menus()\n    item = next((i for i in menus if i['item_id'] == item_id), None)\n    if not item:\n        abort(404)\n    return render_template('item_details.html', item=item)\n\n# 6. `/cart` - show_cart\n@app.route('/cart')\ndef show_cart():\n    cart_items_raw = load_cart()\n    menus = load_menus()\n    cart_items = []\n    total_amount = 0.0\n    for c in cart_items_raw:\n        menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == c['item_id']), None)\n        if menu_item:\n            item_total = menu_item['price'] * c['quantity']\n            total_amount += item_total\n            item_detail = {\n                'item_id': menu_item['item_id'],\n                'item_name': menu_item['item_name'],\n                'quantity': c['quantity'],\n                'price': menu_item['price'],\n                'total': item_total\n            }\n            cart_items.append(item_detail)\n    return render_template('cart.html', cart_items=cart_items, total_amount=total_amount)\n\n# 7. `/cart/add/<int:item_id>` - add_to_cart\n@app.route('/cart/add/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef add_to_cart(item_id):\n    # Load existing cart\n    cart = load_cart()\n    menus = load_menus()\n    menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == item_id and m['availability']), None)\n    if not menu_item:\n        abort(404)\n    # Check if item already in cart; increment quantity if so\n    found = False\n    for c in cart:\n        if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n            c['quantity'] += 1\n            found = True\n            break\n    if not found:\n        # create new cart_id\n        new_cart_id = max([c['cart_id'] for c in cart], default=0) + 1\n        today_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n        cart.append({\n            'cart_id': new_cart_id,\n            'item_id': item_id,\n            'restaurant_id': menu_item['restaurant_id'],\n            'quantity': 1,\n            'added_date': today_str\n        })\n    # Save updated cart\n    write_cart(cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 8. `/cart/update/<int:item_id>` - update_cart_quantity\n@app.route('/cart/update/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef update_cart_quantity(item_id):\n    quantity_str = request.form.get('quantity', '').strip()\n    try:\n        quantity = int(quantity_str)\n        if quantity < 0:\n            quantity = 0\n    except (ValueError, TypeError):\n        return abort(400)  # bad request\n\n    cart = load_cart()\n    updated = False\n    # Update quantity or remove item if quantity = 0\n    new_cart = []\n    for c in cart:\n        if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n            if quantity > 0:\n                c['quantity'] = quantity\n                new_cart.append(c)\n            # else skip to remove\n            updated = True\n        else:\n            new_cart.append(c)\n    if not updated:\n        abort(404)\n    write_cart(new_cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 9. `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>` - remove_from_cart\n@app.route('/cart/remove/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef remove_from_cart(item_id):\n    cart = load_cart()\n    new_cart = [c for c in cart if c['item_id'] != item_id]\n    if len(new_cart) == len(cart):\n        abort(404)  # item not found in cart\n    write_cart(new_cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 10. `/checkout` - proceed_checkout\n@app.route('/checkout', methods=['POST'])\ndef proceed_checkout():\n    customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name', '').strip()\n    delivery_address = request.form.get('delivery_address', '').strip()\n    phone_number = request.form.get('phone_number', '').strip()\n    payment_method = request.form.get('payment_method', '').strip()\n\n    # Basic validation\n    if not customer_name or not delivery_address or not phone_number or not payment_method:\n        # Insufficient form data, could render with an error msg but spec doesn't specify\n        return abort(400)\n\n    cart_items_raw = load_cart()\n    if not cart_items_raw:\n        return abort(400)  # empty cart\n\n    menus = load_menus()\n\n    # Calculate total\n    total_amount = 0.0\n    order_items = []\n    unique_restaurant_ids = set()\n    for c in cart_items_raw:\n        menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == c['item_id']), None)\n        if not menu_item:\n            continue\n        total_amount += menu_item['price'] * c['quantity']\n        order_items.append({\n            'item_id': c['item_id'],\n            'quantity': c['quantity'],\n            'price': menu_item['price']\n        })\n        unique_restaurant_ids.add(menu_item['restaurant_id'])\n\n    # If multiple restaurants in cart, take first restaurant id for order (spec does not clarify)\n    restaurant_id_for_order = next(iter(unique_restaurant_ids), 0)\n\n    # Create new order with new order_id\n    orders = load_orders()\n    new_order_id = max([o['order_id'] for o in orders], default=0) + 1\n    today_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n\n    new_order = {\n        'order_id': new_order_id,\n        'customer_name': customer_name,\n        'restaurant_id': restaurant_id_for_order,\n        'order_date': today_str,\n        'total_amount': total_amount,\n        'status': 'Pending',\n        'delivery_address': delivery_address,\n        'phone_number': phone_number\n    }\n\n    # We must store the order and order_items in their respective files\n    try:\n        save_order(new_order)\n        save_order_items(new_order_id, order_items)\n        # Clear user's cart\n        clear_cart()\n    except Exception:\n        abort(500)  # internal error\n\n    return render_template('checkout.html', cart_items=order_items, total_amount=total_amount, order_confirmation=new_order)\n\n# 11. `/orders` - list_active_orders\n@app.route('/orders')\ndef list_active_orders():\n    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', '').strip()\n    orders = load_orders()\n    if status_filter:\n        filtered_orders = [o for o in orders if o['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower()]\n    else:\n        filtered_orders = orders\n    return render_template('active_orders.html', active_orders=filtered_orders, status_filter=status_filter)\n\n# 12. `/tracking/<int:order_id>` - track_order\n@app.route('/tracking/<int:order_id>')\ndef track_order(order_id):\n    orders = load_orders()\n    order_details = next((o for o in orders if o['order_id'] == order_id), None)\n    if not order_details:\n        abort(404)\n    deliveries = load_deliveries()\n    delivery_driver_info = next((d for d in deliveries if d['order_id'] == order_id), None)\n    # estimated_time as string or fallback '-'\n    estimated_time = delivery_driver_info['estimated_time'] if delivery_driver_info else '-'\n    return render_template('tracking.html', order_details=order_details, delivery_driver_info=delivery_driver_info or {}, estimated_time=estimated_time)\n\n# 13. `/reviews` - show_reviews\n@app.route('/reviews')\ndef show_reviews():\n    rating_filter = request.args.get('rating_filter', '').strip()\n    reviews = load_reviews()\n    if rating_filter:\n        try:\n            rating_filter_int = int(rating_filter)\n            filtered_reviews = [r for r in reviews if r['rating'] == rating_filter_int]\n        except ValueError:\n            filtered_reviews = reviews\n    else:\n        filtered_reviews = reviews\n    return render_template('reviews.html', reviews=filtered_reviews, rating_filter=rating_filter)\n\n# 14. `/reviews/write` - write_review\n@app.route('/reviews/write', methods=['GET', 'POST'])\ndef write_review():\n    if request.method == 'GET':\n        return render_template('write_review.html')\n    else:\n        try:\n            restaurant_id_str = request.form.get('restaurant_id', '').strip()\n            customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name', '').strip()\n            rating_str = request.form.get('rating', '').strip()\n            review_text = request.form.get('review_text', '').strip()\n\n            restaurant_id = int(restaurant_id_str)\n            rating = int(rating_str)\n\n            if not customer_name or not review_text or rating < 1 or rating > 5:\n                return abort(400)\n\n            reviews = load_reviews()\n            new_review_id = max([r['review_id'] for r in reviews], default=0) + 1\n            today_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n\n            new_review = {\n                'review_id': new_review_id,\n                'restaurant_id': restaurant_id,\n                'customer_name': customer_name,\n                'rating': rating,\n                'review_text': review_text,\n                'review_date': today_str\n            }\n\n            save_review(new_review)\n            return redirect(url_for('show_reviews'))\n        except (ValueError, TypeError):\n            return abort(400)\n\n\n# --- SAVE FUNCTIONS ---\n\ndef write_cart(cart_items):\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'cart.txt')\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for c in cart_items:\n                line = f\"{c['cart_id']}|{c['item_id']}|{c['restaurant_id']}|{c['quantity']}|{c['added_date']}\\n\"\n                f.write(line)\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n\n\ndef save_order(order):\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'orders.txt')\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            line = f\"{order['order_id']}|{order['customer_name']}|{order['restaurant_id']}|{order['order_date']}|{order['total_amount']}|{order['status']}|{order['delivery_address']}|{order['phone_number']}\\n\"\n            f.write(line)\n    except Exception:\n        raise\n\n\ndef save_order_items(order_id, order_items):\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'order_items.txt')\n    # Get next order_item_id to use\n    existing_items = load_order_items()\n    max_item_id = max([oi['order_item_id'] for oi in existing_items], default=0)\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, 'a', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for oi in order_items:\n                max_item_id += 1\n                line = f\"{max_item_id}|{order_id}|{oi['item_id']}|{oi['quantity']}|{oi['price']}\\n\"\n                f.write(line)\n    except Exception:\n        raise\n\n\ndef clear_cart():\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'cart.txt')\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            f.write('')\n    except Exception:\n        pass\n\n\ndef save_review(review):\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'reviews.txt')\n    try:\n        with open(file_path, 'a', === design_spec.md ===
# FoodDelivery Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                               | Function Name           | HTTP Method | Template File          | Context Variables                                                                                         | Notes/Parameters                           |
|-----------------------------------------|-------------------------|-------------|------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `/`                                     | redirect_to_dashboard    | GET         | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Redirect root to `/dashboard`
| `/dashboard`                            | show_dashboard          | GET         | dashboard.html         | featured_restaurants: List[dict], popular_cuisines: List[str]                                            | Main landing page                         |
| `/restaurants`                         | list_restaurants        | GET         | restaurants.html       | restaurants: List[dict], search_query: str, cuisine_filter: str                                           | Browse restaurants, with filters          |
| `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu`| show_menu              | GET         | menu.html              | restaurant: dict, menu_items: List[dict]                                                                 | Menu for a specific restaurant             |
| `/items/<int:item_id>`                 | show_item_details       | GET         | item_details.html      | item: dict                                                                                               | Item details view                         |
| `/cart`                               | show_cart               | GET         | cart.html              | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float                                                             | Show shopping cart                        |
| `/cart/add/<int:item_id>`              | add_to_cart             | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Add item to cart                          |
| `/cart/update/<int:item_id>`           | update_cart_quantity    | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Update item quantity in cart              |
| `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>`           | remove_from_cart        | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Remove item from cart                     |
| `/checkout`                           | proceed_checkout        | POST        | checkout.html          | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float, order_confirmation: dict (optional)                          | Checkout order placement                  |
| `/orders`                             | list_active_orders      | GET         | active_orders.html     | active_orders: List[dict], status_filter: str                                                           | List user's active orders                 |
| `/tracking/<int:order_id>`             | track_order            | GET         | tracking.html          | order_details: dict, delivery_driver_info: dict, estimated_time: str                                     | Order tracking page                       |
| `/reviews`                           | show_reviews            | GET         | reviews.html           | reviews: List[dict], rating_filter: str                                                                  | List and filter reviews                   |
| `/reviews/write`                     | write_review            | GET/POST    | write_review.html      | - (GET: form display, POST: submission processing)                                                       | Write new review page                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Div container `dashboard-page` with featured restaurants and navigation buttons
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (div) - main dashboard container
  - `featured-restaurants` (div) - featured restaurant list
  - `browse-restaurants-button` (button) - navigate to `/restaurants`
  - `view-cart-button` (button) - navigate to `/cart`
  - `active-orders-button` (button) - navigate to `/orders`

### restaurants.html
- File path: `templates/restaurants.html`
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Div container `restaurants-page` wraps search/filter inputs and restaurants grid
- Element IDs:
  - `restaurants-page` (div)
  - `search-input` (input, text) - search box
  - `cuisine-filter` (dropdown)
  - `restaurants-grid` (div) - grid of restaurant cards
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id}` (button) for each restaurant

### menu.html
- File path: `templates/menu.html`
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Div container `menu-page` with restaurant info and menu grid
- Element IDs:
  - `menu-page` (div)
  - `restaurant-name` (h1) - display restaurant name
  - `restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating
  - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items
  - Dynamic button ID patterns:
    - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)
    - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)

### item_details.html
- File path: `templates/item_details.html`
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Div container `item-details-page` with item name, description, price, and cart controls
- Element IDs:
  - `item-details-page` (div)
  - `item-name` (h1)
  - `item-description` (div)
  - `item-price` (div)
  - `quantity-input` (input, number)
  - `add-to-cart-button` (button)

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Div container `cart-page` with cart items table and controls
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (div)
  - `cart-items-table` (table)
  - Per cart item dynamic IDs:
    - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (input, number)
    - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (button)
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (button)
  - `total-amount` (div)

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Div container `checkout-page` with input fields for user info and order submission
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (div)
  - `customer-name` (input, text)
  - `delivery-address` (textarea)
  - `phone-number` (input, text)
  - `payment-method` (dropdown)
  - `place-order-button` (button)

### active_orders.html
- File path: `templates/active_orders.html`
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: Div container `active-orders-page` listing orders with filter controls
- Element IDs:
  - `active-orders-page` (div)
  - `orders-list` (div)
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `track-order-button-{order_id}` (button)
  - `status-filter` (dropdown)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)

### tracking.html
- File path: `templates/tracking.html`
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Div container `tracking-page` with order details and delivery info
- Element IDs:
  - `tracking-page` (div)

# FoodDelivery Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                               | Function Name           | HTTP Method | Template File          | Context Variables                                                                                         | Notes/Parameters                           |
|-----------------------------------------|-------------------------|-------------|------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `/`                                     | redirect_to_dashboard    | GET         | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Redirect root to `/dashboard`
| `/dashboard`                            | show_dashboard          | GET         | dashboard.html         | featured_restaurants: List[dict], popular_cuisines: List[str]                                            | Main landing page                         |
| `/restaurants`                         | list_restaurants        | GET         | restaurants.html       | restaurants: List[dict], search_query: str, cuisine_filter: str                                           | Browse restaurants, with filters          |
| `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu`| show_menu              | GET         | menu.html              | restaurant: dict, menu_items: List[dict]                                                                 | Menu for a specific restaurant             |
| `/items/<int:item_id>`                 | show_item_details       | GET         | item_details.html      | item: dict                                                                                               | Item details view                         |
| `/cart`                               | show_cart               | GET         | cart.html              | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float                                                             | Show shopping cart                        |
| `/cart/add/<int:item_id>`              | add_to_cart             | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Add item to cart                          |
| `/cart/update/<int:item_id>`           | update_cart_quantity    | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Update item quantity in cart              |
| `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>`           | remove_from_cart        | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Remove item from cart                     |
| `/checkout`                           | proceed_checkout        | POST        | checkout.html          | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float, order_confirmation: dict (optional)                          | Checkout order placement                  |
| `/orders`                             | list_active_orders      | GET         | active_orders.html     | active_orders: List[dict], status_filter: str                                                           | List user's active orders                 |
| `/tracking/<int:order_id>`             | track_order            | GET         | tracking.html          | order_details: dict, delivery_driver_info: dict, estimated_time: str                                     | Order tracking page                       |
| `/reviews`                           | show_reviews            | GET         | reviews.html           | reviews: List[dict], rating_filter: str                                                                  | List and filter reviews                   |
| `/reviews/write`                     | write_review            | GET/POST    | write_review.html      | - (GET: form display, POST: submission processing)                                                       | Write new review page                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Div container `dashboard-page` with featured restaurants and navigation buttons
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (div) - main dashboard container
  - `featured-restaurants` (div) - featured restaurant list
  - `browse-restaurants-button` (button) - navigate to `/restaurants`
  - `view-cart-button` (button) - navigate to `/cart`
  - `active-orders-button` (button) - navigate to `/orders`

### restaurants.html
- File path: `templates/restaurants.html`
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Div container `restaurants-page` wraps search/filter inputs and restaurants grid
- Element IDs:
  - `restaurants-page` (div)
  - `search-input` (input, text) - search box
  - `cuisine-filter` (dropdown)
  - `restaurants-grid` (div) - grid of restaurant cards
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id}` (button) for each restaurant

- File path: `templates/menu.html`
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Div container `menu-page` with restaurant info and menu grid
- Element IDs:
  - `menu-page` (div)
  - `restaurant-name` (h1) - display restaurant name
  - `restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating
  - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items

    - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)
    - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)

- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Div container `menu-page` with restaurant info and menu grid
- Element IDs:
  - `menu-page` (div)
  - `restaurant-name` (h1) - display restaurant name
  - `restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating
  - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items
  - Dynamic button ID patterns:
    - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)
    - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)

### item_details.html
- File path: `templates/item_details.html`
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Div container `item-details-page` with item name, description, price, and cart controls
- Element IDs:
  - `item-details-page` (div)
  - `item-name` (h1)
  - `item-description` (div)
  - `item-price` (div)
  - `quantity-input` (input, number)
  - `add-to-cart-button` (button)

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Div container `cart-page` with cart items table and controls
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (div)
  - `cart-items-table` (table)
  - Per cart item dynamic IDs:
    - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (input, number)
    - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (button)
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (button)
  - `total-amount` (div)

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Div container `checkout-page` with input fields for user info and order submission
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (div)
  - `customer-name` (input, text)
  - `delivery-address` (textarea)
  - `phone-number` (input, text)
  - `payment-method` (dropdown)
  - `place-order-button` (button)

### active_orders.html
- File path: `templates/active_orders.html`
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: Div container `active-orders-page` listing orders with filter controls
- Element IDs:
  - `active-orders-page` (div)
  - `orders-list` (div)
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `track-order-button-{order_id}` (button)
  - `status-filter` (dropdown)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)

### tracking.html
- File path: `templates/tracking.html`
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Div container `tracking-page` with order details and delivery info
- Element IDs:
  - `tracking-page` (div)
  - `order-details` (div)
  - `delivery-driver-info` (div)
  - `estimated-time` (div)
  - `order-items-list` (div)
  - `back-to-orders` (button)

### reviews.html
- File path: `templates/reviews.html`
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Layout Overview: Div container `reviews-page` for reviews list and filtering
- Element IDs:
  - `reviews-page` (div)
  - `reviews-list` (div)
  - `write-review-button` (button)
  - `filter-by-rating` (dropdown)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)

## 3. Data Schemas

| File Name         | Fields (pipe-delimited)                                                       | Data Types                                                  | Purpose                                  | Example Rows                                                                                                                       |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `restaurants.txt`  | restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order               | int|string|string|string|string|float|int|float                   | Stores restaurant details               | 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00                              |
| `menus.txt`       | item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability                   | int|int|string|string|string|float|bool                   | Stores menu items per restaurant        | 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1                |
| `cart.txt`        | cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date                                | int|int|int|int|date                             | Stores shopping cart items              | 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|2|1|2025-01-16                                                                                                    |
| `orders.txt`      | order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number | int|string|int|date|float|string|string|string         | Stores placed orders                    | 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678               |
| `order_items.txt` | order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price                                  | int|int|int|int|float                             | Stores items in each order              | 1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|2|1|8.99
3|2|3|1|14.99                                                                                                   |
| `deliveries.txt`  | delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time       | int|int|string|string|string|string|datetime                         | Stores delivery information            | 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30                                               |
| `reviews.txt`     | review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date               | int|int|string|int|string|date                             | Stores customer reviews                | 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15                               |

---

This comprehensive design specification allows backend and frontend developers to work independently with unambiguous details covering routes, HTML templates, element IDs, context variables, and data schemas.

=== design_spec.md ===
# FoodDelivery Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                               | Function Name           | HTTP Method | Template File          | Context Variables                                                                                         | Notes/Parameters                           |
|-----------------------------------------|-------------------------|-------------|------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `/`                                     | redirect_to_dashboard    | GET         | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Redirect root to `/dashboard`
| `/dashboard`                            | show_dashboard          | GET         | dashboard.html         | featured_restaurants: List[dict], popular_cuisines: List[str]                                            | Main landing page                         |
| `/restaurants`                         | list_restaurants        | GET         | restaurants.html       | restaurants: List[dict], search_query: str, cuisine_filter: str                                           | Browse restaurants, with filters          |
| `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu`| show_menu              | GET         | menu.html              | restaurant: dict, menu_items: List[dict]                                                                 | Menu for a specific restaurant             |
| `/items/<int:item_id>`                 | show_item_details       | GET         | item_details.html      | item: dict                                                                                               | Item details view                         |
| `/cart`                               | show_cart               | GET         | cart.html              | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float                                                             | Show shopping cart                        |
| `/cart/add/<int:item_id>`              | add_to_cart             | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Add item to cart                          |
| `/cart/update/<int:item_id>`           | update_cart_quantity    | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Update item quantity in cart              |
| `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>`           | remove_from_cart        | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Remove item from cart                     |
| `/checkout`                           | proceed_checkout        | POST        | checkout.html          | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float, order_confirmation: dict (optional)                          | Checkout order placement                  |
| `/orders`                             | list_active_orders      | GET         | active_orders.html     | active_orders: List[dict], status_filter: str                                                           | List user's active orders                 |
| `/tracking/<int:order_id>`             | track_order            | GET         | tracking.html          | order_details: dict, delivery_driver_info: dict, estimated_time: str                                     | Order tracking page                       |
| `/reviews`                           | show_reviews            | GET         | reviews.html           | reviews: List[dict], rating_filter: str                                                                  | List and filter reviews                   |
| `/reviews/write`                     | write_review            | GET/POST    | write_review.html      | - (GET: form display, POST: submission processing)                                                       | Write new review page                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Div container `dashboard-page` with featured restaurants and navigation buttons
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (div) - main dashboard container
  - `featured-restaurants` (div) - featured restaurant list
  - `browse-restaurants-button` (button) - navigate to `/restaurants`
  - `view-cart-button` (button) - navigate to `/cart`
  - `active-orders-button` (button) - navigate to `/orders`

### restaurants.html
- File path: `templates/restaurants.html`
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Div container `restaurants-page` wraps search/filter inputs and restaurants grid
- Element IDs:
  - `restaurants-page` (div)
  - `search-input` (input, text) - search box
  - `cuisine-filter` (dropdown)
  - `restaurants-grid` (div) - grid of restaurant cards
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id}` (button) for each restaurant

### menu.html
- File path: `templates/menu.html`
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Div container `menu-page` with restaurant info and menu grid
- Element IDs:
  - `menu-page` (div)
  - `restaurant-name` (h1) - display restaurant name
  - `restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating
  - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items
  - Dynamic button ID patterns:
    - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)
    - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)

### item_details.html
- File path: `templates/item_details.html`
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Div container `item-details-page` with item name, description, price, and cart controls
- Element IDs:
  - `item-details-page` (div)
  - `item-name` (h1)
  - `item-description` (div)
  - `item-price` (div)
  - `quantity-input` (input, number)
  - `add-to-cart-button` (button)

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Div container `cart-page` with cart items table and controls
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (div)
  - `cart-items-table` (table)
  - Per cart item dynamic IDs:
    - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (input, number)
    - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (button)
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (button)
  - `total-amount` (div)

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Div container `checkout-page` with input fields for user info and order submission
- Element IDs:
  - `checkout-page` (div)
  - `customer-name` (input, text)
  - `delivery-address` (textarea)
  - `phone-number` (input, text)
  - `payment-method` (dropdown)
  - `place-order-button` (button)

### active_orders.html
- File path: `templates/active_orders.html`
- Page Title: Active Orders
- Layout Overview: Div container `active-orders-page` listing orders with filter controls
- Element IDs:
  - `active-orders-page` (div)
  - `orders-list` (div)
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `track-order-button-{order_id}` (button)
  - `status-filter` (dropdown)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)

### tracking.html
- File path: `templates/tracking.html`
- Page Title: Track Order
- Layout Overview: Div container `tracking-page` with order details and delivery info
- Element IDs:
  - `tracking-page` (div)
  - `order-details` (div)
  - `delivery-driver-info` (div)
  - `estimated-time` (div)
  - `order-items-list` (div)
  - `back-to-orders` (button)

### reviews.html
- File path: `templates/reviews.html`
- Page Title: Order Reviews
- Layout Overview: Div container `reviews-page` for reviews list and filtering
- Element IDs:
  - `reviews-page` (div)
  - `reviews-list` (div)
  - `write-review-button` (button)
  - `filter-by-rating` (dropdown)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)

## 3. Data Schemas

| File Name         | Fields (pipe-delimited)                                                       | Data Types                                                  | Purpose                                  | Example Rows                                                                                                                       |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `restaurants.txt`  | restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order               | int|string|string|string|string|float|int|float                   | Stores restaurant details               | 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00                              |
| `menus.txt`       | item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability                   | int|int|string|string|string|float|bool                   | Stores menu items per restaurant        | 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1                |
| `cart.txt`        | cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date                                | int|int|int|int|date                             | Stores shopping cart items              | 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|2|1|2025-01-16                                                                                                    |
| `orders.txt`      | order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number | int|string|int|date|float|string|string|string         | Stores placed orders                    | 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678               |
| `order_items.txt` | order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price                                  | int|int|int|int|float                             | Stores items in each order              | 1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|2|1|8.99
3|2|3|1|14.99                                                                                                   |
| `deliveries.txt`  | delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time       | int|int|string|string|string|string|datetime                         | Stores delivery information            | 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30                                               |
| `reviews.txt`     | review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date               | int|int|string|int|string|date                             | Stores customer reviews                | 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15                               |

---

This comprehensive design specification allows backend and frontend developers to work independently with unambiguous details covering routes, HTML templates, element IDs, context variables, and data schemas.

=== design_spec.md ===
# FoodDelivery Application Design Specification

---

## 1. Flask Routes Specification

| Route Path                               | Function Name           | HTTP Method | Template File          | Context Variables                                                                                         | Notes/Parameters                           |
|-----------------------------------------|-------------------------|-------------|------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------|
| `/`                                     | redirect_to_dashboard    | GET         | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Redirect root to `/dashboard`
| `/dashboard`                            | show_dashboard          | GET         | dashboard.html         | featured_restaurants: List[dict], popular_cuisines: List[str]                                            | Main landing page                         |
| `/restaurants`                         | list_restaurants        | GET         | restaurants.html       | restaurants: List[dict], search_query: str, cuisine_filter: str                                           | Browse restaurants, with filters          |
| `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu`| show_menu              | GET         | menu.html              | restaurant: dict, menu_items: List[dict]                                                                 | Menu for a specific restaurant             |
| `/items/<int:item_id>`                 | show_item_details       | GET         | item_details.html      | item: dict                                                                                               | Item details view                         |
| `/cart`                               | show_cart               | GET         | cart.html              | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float                                                             | Show shopping cart                        |
| `/cart/add/<int:item_id>`              | add_to_cart             | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Add item to cart                          |
| `/cart/update/<int:item_id>`           | update_cart_quantity    | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Update item quantity in cart              |
| `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>`           | remove_from_cart        | POST        | -                      | -                                                                                                        | Remove item from cart                     |
| `/checkout`                           | proceed_checkout        | POST        | checkout.html          | cart_items: List[dict], total_amount: float, order_confirmation: dict (optional)                          | Checkout order placement                  |
| `/orders`                             | list_active_orders      | GET         | active_orders.html     | active_orders: List[dict], status_filter: str                                                           | List user's active orders                 |
| `/tracking/<int:order_id>`             | track_order            | GET         | tracking.html          | order_details: dict, delivery_driver_info: dict, estimated_time: str                                     | Order tracking page                       |
| `/reviews`                           | show_reviews            | GET         | reviews.html           | reviews: List[dict], rating_filter: str                                                                  | List and filter reviews                   |
| `/reviews/write`                     | write_review            | GET/POST    | write_review.html      | - (GET: form display, POST: submission processing)                                                       | Write new review page                     |

---

## 2. HTML Template Specifications

### dashboard.html
- File path: `templates/dashboard.html`
- Page Title: Food Delivery Dashboard
- Layout Overview: Div container `dashboard-page` with featured restaurants and navigation buttons
- Element IDs:
  - `dashboard-page` (div) - main dashboard container
  - `featured-restaurants` (div) - featured restaurant list
  - `browse-restaurants-button` (button) - navigate to `/restaurants`
  - `view-cart-button` (button) - navigate to `/cart`
  - `active-orders-button` (button) - navigate to `/orders`

### restaurants.html
- File path: `templates/restaurants.html`
- Page Title: Browse Restaurants
- Layout Overview: Div container `restaurants-page` wraps search/filter inputs and restaurants grid
- Element IDs:
  - `restaurants-page` (div)
  - `search-input` (input, text) - search box
  - `cuisine-filter` (dropdown)
  - `restaurants-grid` (div) - grid of restaurant cards
  - Dynamic button ID pattern: `view-restaurant-button-{restaurant_id}` (button) for each restaurant

### menu.html
- File path: `templates/menu.html`
- Page Title: Restaurant Menu
- Layout Overview: Div container `menu-page` with restaurant info and menu grid
- Element IDs:
  - `menu-page` (div)
  - `restaurant-name` (h1) - display restaurant name
  - `restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating
  - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items
  - Dynamic button ID patterns:
    - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)
    - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)

### item_details.html
- File path: `templates/item_details.html`
- Page Title: Item Details
- Layout Overview: Div container `item-details-page` with item name, description, price, and cart controls
- Element IDs:
  - `item-details-page` (div)
  - `item-name` (h1)
  - `item-description` (div)
  - `item-price` (div)
  - `quantity-input` (input, number)
  - `add-to-cart-button` (button)

### cart.html
- File path: `templates/cart.html`
- Page Title: Shopping Cart
- Layout Overview: Div container `cart-page` with cart items table and controls
- Element IDs:
  - `cart-page` (div)
  - `cart-items-table` (table)
  - Per cart item dynamic IDs:
    - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (input, number)
    - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (button)
  - `proceed-checkout-button` (button)
  - `total-amount` (div)

### checkout.html
- File path: `templates/checkout.html`
- Page Title: Checkout
- Layout Overview: Div container `checkout-page` with input fields for user info and order submission
- Element IDs:

---

## 3. Data Schemas

| File Name         | Fields (pipe-delimited)                                                       | Data Types                                                  | Purpose                                  | Example Rows                                                                                                                       |
|-------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------------------------|-------------------------------------------------------------|------------------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `restaurants.txt`  | restaurant_id|name|cuisine|address|phone|rating|delivery_time|min_order               | int|string|string|string|string|float|int|float                   | Stores restaurant details               | 1|Dragon House|Chinese|123 Main St|555-0001|4.5|30|15.00
2|La Bella Italia|Italian|456 Oak Ave|555-0002|4.8|25|20.00
3|Taj Mahal|Indian|789 Elm St|555-0003|4.6|35|18.00                              |
| `menus.txt`       | item_id|restaurant_id|item_name|category|description|price|availability                   | int|int|string|string|string|float|bool                   | Stores menu items per restaurant        | 1|1|Fried Rice|Main Course|Steamed rice with vegetables and egg|12.99|1
2|1|Spring Rolls|Appetizer|Crispy rolls with pork filling|8.99|1
3|2|Spaghetti Carbonara|Pasta|Classic Italian pasta with cream sauce|14.99|1                |
| `cart.txt`        | cart_id|item_id|restaurant_id|quantity|added_date                                | int|int|int|int|date                             | Stores shopping cart items              | 1|1|1|2|2025-01-15
2|3|2|1|2025-01-16                                                                                                    |
| `orders.txt`      | order_id|customer_name|restaurant_id|order_date|total_amount|status|delivery_address|phone_number | int|string|int|date|float|string|string|string         | Stores placed orders                    | 1|John Doe|1|2025-01-10|21.98|Delivered|123 Main St, NYC|555-1234
2|Jane Smith|2|2025-01-14|14.99|On the Way|456 Oak Ave, LA|555-5678               |
| `order_items.txt` | order_item_id|order_id|item_id|quantity|price                                  | int|int|int|int|float                             | Stores items in each order              | 1|1|1|2|12.99
2|1|2|1|8.99
3|2|3|1|14.99                                                                                                   |
| `deliveries.txt`  | delivery_id|order_id|driver_name|driver_phone|vehicle_info|status|estimated_time       | int|int|string|string|string|string|datetime                         | Stores delivery information            | 1|1|Mike Johnson|555-9001|Bike|Delivered|2025-01-10 18:45
2|2|Sarah Williams|555-9002|Car|On the Way|2025-01-14 19:30                                               |
| `reviews.txt`     | review_id|restaurant_id|customer_name|rating|review_text|review_date               | int|int|string|int|string|date                             | Stores customer reviews                | 1|1|Alice Johnson|5|Excellent food and fast delivery!|2025-01-12
2|2|Bob Williams|4|Great pasta, slightly delayed delivery.|2025-01-13
3|3|Charlie Brown|5|Best Indian food in town!|2025-01-15                               |

`restaurant-info` (div) - address, phone, rating   - `menu-items-grid` (div) - grid of menu items   - Dynamic button ID patterns:     - `add-to-cart-button-{item_id}` (button)     - `view-item-details-{item_id}` (button)  ### item_details.html - File path: `templates/item_details.html` - Page Title: Item Details - Layout Overview: Div container `item-details-page` with item name, description, price, and cart controls - Element IDs:   - `item-details-page` (div)   - `item-name` (h1)   - `item-description` (div)   - `item-price` (div)   - `quantity-input` (input, number)   - `add-to-cart-button` (button)  ### cart.html - File path: `templates/cart.html` - Page Title: Shopping Cart - Layout Overview: Div container `cart-page` with cart items table and controls - Element IDs:   - `cart-page` (div)   - `cart-items-table` (table)   - Per cart item dynamic IDs:     - `update-quantity-{item_id}` (input, number)     - `remove-item-button-{item_id}` (button)   - `proceed-checkout-button` (button)   - `total-amount` (div)  ### checkout.html - File path: `templates/checkout.html` - Page Title: Checkout - Layout Overview: Div container `checkout-page` with input fields for user info and order submission - Element IDs:   - `checkout-page` (div)   - `customer-name` (input, text)   - `delivery-address` (textarea)   - `phone-number` (input, text)   - `payment-method` (dropdown)   - `place-order-button` (button)  ### active_orders.html - list of dicts.\"\"\"\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'reviews.txt')\n    reviews = []\n    if not os.path.isfile(file_path):\n        return reviews\n    with open(file_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n        for line in f:\n            line=line.strip()\n            if not line:\n                continue\n            parts = line.split('|')\n            if len(parts)!=6:\n                continue\n            try:\n                review = {\n                    'review_id': int(parts[0]),\n                    'restaurant_id': int(parts[1]),\n                    'customer_name': parts[2],\n                    'rating': int(parts[3]),\n                    'review_text': parts[4],\n                    'review_date': parts[5]  # string date\n                }\n                reviews.append(review)\n            except ValueError:\n                continue\n    return reviews\n\n\n# --- ROUTE IMPLEMENTATIONS ---\n\n# 1. `/` - show_dashboard():\n    restaurants = load_restaurants()\n    featured_restaurants = sorted(restaurants, key=lambda x: x['rating'], reverse=True)[:3]\n    popular_cuisines = sorted({r['cuisine'] for r in restaurants})\n    return render_template('dashboard.html', featured_restaurants=featured_restaurants, popular_cuisines=popular_cuisines)\n\n# 3. `/restaurants` - list_restaurants\n@app.route('/restaurants')\ndef list_restaurants():\n    restaurants = load_restaurants()\n    search_query = request.args.get('search_query', '').strip()\n    cuisine_filter = request.args.get('cuisine_filter', '').strip()\n\n    filtered_restaurants = restaurants\n    if search_query:\n        filtered_restaurants = [r for r in filtered_restaurants if search_query.lower() in r['name'].lower()]\n    if cuisine_filter:\n        filtered_restaurants = [r for r in filtered_restaurants if r['cuisine'].lower() == cuisine_filter.lower()]\n\n    return render_template('restaurants.html', restaurants=filtered_restaurants, search_query=search_query, cuisine_filter=cuisine_filter)\n\n# 4. `/restaurants/<int:restaurant_id>/menu` - == restaurant_id), None)\n    if not restaurant:\n        abort(404)\n    menus = load_menus()\n    menu_items = [item for item in menus if item['restaurant_id'] == restaurant_id and item['availability']]\n    return render_template('menu.html', restaurant=restaurant, menu_items=menu_items)\n\n# 5. `/items/<int:item_id>` - show_item_details\n@app.route('/items/<int:item_id>')\ndef show_item_details(item_id):\n    menus = load_menus()\n    item = next((i for i in menus if i['item_id'] == item_id), None)\n    if not item:\n        abort(404)\n    return render_template('item_details.html', item=item)\n\n# 6. `/cart` - show_cart\n@app.route('/cart')\ndef show_cart():\n    cart_items_raw = load_cart()\n    menus = load_menus()\n    cart_items = []\n    total_amount = 0.0\n    for c in cart_items_raw:\n        menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == c['item_id']), None)\n        if menu_item:\n            item_total = menu_item['price'] * c['quantity']\n            total_amount += item_total\n            item_detail = {\n                'item_id': menu_item['item_id'],\n                'item_name': menu_item['item_name'],\n                'quantity': c['quantity'],\n                'price': menu_item['price'],\n                'total': item_total\n            }\n            cart_items.append(item_detail)\n    return render_template('cart.html', cart_items=cart_items, total_amount=total_amount)\n\n# 7. `/cart/add/<int:item_id>` - add_to_cart\n@app.route('/cart/add/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef add_to_cart(item_id):\n    cart = load_cart()\n    menus = load_menus()\n    menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == item_id and m['availability']), None)\n    if not menu_item:\n        abort(404)\n    found = False\n    for c in cart:\n        if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n            c['quantity'] += 1\n            found = True\n            break\n    if not found:\n        new_cart_id = max([c['cart_id'] for c in cart], default=0) + 1\n        today_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n        cart.append({\n            'cart_id': new_cart_id,\n            'item_id': item_id,\n            'restaurant_id': menu_item['restaurant_id'],\n            'quantity': 1,\n            'added_date': today_str\n        })\n    write_cart(cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 8. `/cart/update/<int:item_id>` - update_cart_quantity\n@app.route('/cart/update/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef update_cart_quantity(item_id):\n    quantity_str = request.form.get('quantity', '').strip()\n    try:\n        quantity = int(quantity_str)\n        if quantity < 0:\n            quantity = 0\n    except (ValueError, TypeError):\n        return abort(400)\n\n    cart = load_cart()\n    updated = False\n    new_cart = []\n    for c in cart:\n        if c['item_id'] == item_id:\n            if quantity > 0:\n                c['quantity'] = quantity\n                new_cart.append(c)\n            updated = True\n        else:\n            new_cart.append(c)\n    if not updated:\n        abort(404)\n    write_cart(new_cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 9. `/cart/remove/<int:item_id>` - remove_from_cart\n@app.route('/cart/remove/<int:item_id>', methods=['POST'])\ndef remove_from_cart(item_id):\n    cart = load_cart()\n    new_cart = [c for c in cart if c['item_id'] != item_id]\n    if len(new_cart) == len(cart):\n        abort(404)\n    write_cart(new_cart)\n    return redirect(url_for('show_cart'))\n\n# 10. `/checkout` - proceed_checkout\n@app.route('/checkout', methods=['POST'])\ndef proceed_checkout():\n    customer_name = request.form.get('customer_name', '').strip()\n    delivery_address = request.form.get('delivery_address', '').strip()\n    phone_number = request.form.get('phone_number', '').strip()\n    payment_method = request.form.get('payment_method', '').strip()\n\n    if not customer_name or not delivery_address or not phone_number or not payment_method:\n        return abort(400)\n\n    cart_items_raw = load_cart()\n    if not cart_items_raw:\n        return abort(400)\n\n    menus = load_menus()\n    total_amount = 0.0\n    order_items = []\n    unique_restaurant_ids = set()\n\n    for c in cart_items_raw:\n        menu_item = next((m for m in menus if m['item_id'] == c['item_id']), None)\n        if not menu_item:\n            continue\n        total_amount += menu_item['price'] * c['quantity']\n        order_items.append({\n            'item_id': c['item_id'],\n            'quantity': c['quantity'],\n            'price': menu_item['price']\n        })\n        unique_restaurant_ids.add(menu_item['restaurant_id'])\n\n    restaurant_id_for_order = next(iter(unique_restaurant_ids), 0)\n\n    orders = load_orders()\n    new_order_id = max([o['order_id'] for o in orders], default=0) + 1\n    today_str = datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n\n    new_order = {\n        'order_id': new_order_id,\n        'customer_name': customer_name,\n        'restaurant_id': restaurant_id_for_order,\n        'order_date': today_str,\n        'total_amount': total_amount,\n        'status': 'Pending',\n        'delivery_address': delivery_address,\n        'phone_number': phone_number\n    }\n\n    try:\n        save_order(new_order)\n        save_order_items(new_order_id, order_items)\n        clear_cart()\n    except Exception:\n        abort(500)\n\n    return render_template('checkout.html', cart_items=order_items, total_amount=total_amount, order_confirmation=new_order)\n\n# 11. `/orders` - list_active_orders\n@app.route('/orders')\ndef list_active_orders():\n    status_filter = request.args.get('status_filter', '').strip()\n    orders = load_orders()\n    if status_filter:\n        filtered_orders = [o for o in orders if o['status'].lower() == status_filter.lower()]\n    else:\n        filtered_orders = orders\n    return render_template('active_orders.html', active_orders=filtered_orders, status_filter=status_filter)\n\n# 12. `/tracking/<int:order_id>` - track_order\n@app.route('/tracking/<int:order_id>')\ndef track_order(order_id):\n    orders = load_orders()\n    order_details = write_review():\n    if request.method == 'GET':\n        return render_template('write_review.html')\n    else:\n        try:\n            restaurant_id_str = request.form.get('restaurant_id',       f.write(line)\n    except Exception:\n        raise\n\n\ndef save_order_items(order_id, order_items):\n    file_path = os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'order_items.txt')\n    existing_items =
